verse.name: v1
verse.lines: The heavens declare Your glory The nations bow before Thee And in this place Let Your praise arise The Philippines is for Christ!

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Reign, reign Lord Jesus In our hearts and in our lives Reign, reign O Lord of the heavens The Philippines is for Christ!

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Forever Your name be exalted O Lord of all creation And in this place We lift Your song on high The Bride is for Christ!

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: Reign, reign Lord Jesus In our hearts And in our lives Reign, reign, O, Lord of the heavens The Bride is for Christ!
